shots.visual: 公园遛娃：近景口播/问题特写
shots.copy: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?
shots.notes: Hook shot opening, park outing with baby, sharp close-up of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference product hero on bedside table, separate baby bottle beside it, cinematic soft light, subtle push-in, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Mood: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?

shots.visual: 公园遛娃：呈现痛点（外出没热水、手忙脚乱、加热太慢宝宝哭闹）
shots.copy: Outdoor feeds should not mean cold milk or long waits.
shots.notes: Park bench with diaper bag, portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference and separate baby bottle, natural daylight, gentle breeze, no person face, no medical claim, USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device, 9:16 USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device

shots.visual: 公园遛娃：奶倒入恒温杯加热，再倒出到奶瓶（便携可充电设计、保温锁温、外出随时加热、多档温控、配件少；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶，圆柱杯体）；用法：奶液倒入杯内加热保温，再倒出到奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、奶瓶插入杯口、奶瓶浸在杯中加热（不是奶瓶暖奶器））
shots.copy: Portable heating that keeps up with your park day.
shots.notes: Product demo, park outing with baby, hands pouring milk INTO portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference, then pouring warm milk OUT into baby bottle, USB-C port visible, clear product shape, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Portable heating that keeps up with your park day.
